creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
An upgrade for p5-Sys-Filesystem from version 1.22 + FreeBSD patches to a vanilla 1.27 build (i.e. w/o FreeBSD patches).

Fix: Please also remove the files directory for the port:

cvs delete p5-Sys-Filesystems/files

The port now works w/o and special FreeBSD patches

Patch attached with submission follows:
